summary: Antibiotics do not significantly reduce overall post-tonsillectomy morbidity; routine administration is discouraged by leading guidelines due to insufficient evidence for benefits and risks related to antimicrobial resistance. Professional consensus supports their limited use only when specific infectious conditions are present before surgery.
